# MangaAura
> La plataforma de manga con IA para leer, crear y crowdfundear capítulos.

## Quick facts
- **Price**: Free for readers. Creators earn through Aura crowdfunding and sponsorships.
- **Language**: Spanish (primary), English (secondary)
- **Platform**: Web (PWA) — installable on mobile and desktop
- **Audience**: Manga readers, manga creators, anime fans, Spanish-speaking LATAM + Spain
- **Content**: User-generated manga, community forums, creator tools

## Pricing
- **Reading**: Free (no subscription required)
- **Aura packs**: 100 Aura ($1.00), 500 Aura ($4.50), 1000 Aura ($8.50), 5000 Aura ($40.00)
- **Premium monthly**: $4.99/month — exclusive chapters, ad-free reading, offline mode, premium badges
- **Premium annual**: $49.99/year (save ~$10)
- **Creator fees**: Zero platform fee — creators keep 100% of crowdfunding
- **Payment**: Stripe (credit/debit card)

## Key pages
- Homepage: https://mangaaura.es — Platform overview and featured manga
- Explore: https://mangaaura.es/explore — Discover manga by genre, popularity, and latest updates
- Rankings: https://mangaaura.es/rankings — Top ranked manga and readers
- Pricing: https://mangaaura.es/pricing — Aura packs and premium subscriptions
- Library: https://mangaaura.es/library — Personal reading library with reading progress tracking
- News: https://mangaaura.es/news — Platform news and manga industry updates
- Blog: https://mangaaura.es/blog — Guides, tutorials and platform insights
- Help: https://mangaaura.es/help — Frequently asked questions and support
- Community: https://mangaaura.es/community — Community hub with forums and clans
- Events: https://mangaaura.es/events — Seasonal events and competitions
- Comparison: https://mangaaura.es/comparison — Compare MangaAura with other platforms
- Announcements: https://mangaaura.es/announcements — Platform announcements

## For creators
- Create manga: https://mangaaura.es/creator/manga/new — Publish a new series
- Dashboard: https://mangaaura.es/creator/dashboard — Creator analytics and management
- Upload chapter: https://mangaaura.es/creator/upload — Upload new manga chapters
- Sponsorships: https://mangaaura.es/creator/sponsors — Sponsorship management for creators

## API & Integration
- /api/og: Dynamic Open Graph image generation
- /api/analytics/web-vitals: Core Web Vitals reporting endpoint
- PWA support with offline reading via Service Worker at /sw.js
- Manifest at /manifest.json for installable web app

## Key Features
- AI-powered manga discovery, recommendations, and automated descriptions
- Crowdfunding for chapters using Aura virtual currency
- Gamification with XP, levels, achievements, and reading streaks
- Offline reading support with full PWA capabilities
- Creator revenue sharing with sponsorship subscriptions
- Two-factor authentication (2FA) for account security
- Real-time notifications via HTTP polling (30s interval) and push notifications
- Multi-language support (Spanish and English)
- Social features: clans, forums, user profiles, and direct messaging
- Image cropping and optimization for manga covers
- Dynamic OG images at /api/og
- Reading history tracking with progress sync across devices
- Weekly rankings for manga and readers based on XP

## Content Policies
- Content is user-generated from creators
- All manga is available for free reading
- Creators earn through Aura crowdfunding and sponsorships
- Manga categories include standard genres (action, romance, fantasy, etc.)
- Content moderation with AI-assisted comment analysis and spoiler detection

## FAQ
- Q: Is MangaAura free? A: Yes, reading manga is completely free. No subscription required.
- Q: How does Aura work? A: Aura is the virtual currency for crowdfunding chapters and supporting creators. Readers buy Aura via Stripe.
- Q: How can I create manga? A: Register as a creator (free) and use the creator dashboard to upload chapters with drag & drop.
- Q: What is crowdfunding? A: Readers contribute Aura to chapters they want published. When the goal is met, the chapter is released for everyone.
- Q: How do creators earn money? A: Creators receive 100% of crowdfunding and sponsorships. Zero platform fees.
- Q: How does the XP system work? A: Readers earn XP by reading chapters (+2 XP), commenting (+5 XP), and submitting corrections (+20 XP). Levels range from Novice (0 XP) to Manga Legend (10000+ XP).
- Q: What are clans? A: Clans are user-created reading groups with rankings, chat, and collaborative goals. Join or create a clan from the community page.
- Q: Can I read offline? A: Yes. MangaAura is a PWA with offline reading support.
- Q: What platforms support MangaAura? A: Any modern browser. Installable as a PWA on mobile and desktop.
- Q: Is there a mobile app? A: Not in app stores, but the PWA works identically and can be installed from any browser.
- Q: How do I contact support? A: Visit https://mangaaura.es/help or email support@mangaaura.es
- Q: Is my account secure? A: Yes. We support two-factor authentication (2FA) and all connections are encrypted via HTTPS.
